stage_not_started_desc: Waiting for chair to call meeting to order
stage_not_started_subtitle: Members may join using their meeting code
stage_call_to_order_desc: The chair will call the meeting to order
stage_approve_minutes_desc: Review and approve minutes from previous meeting
stage_approve_minutes_subtitle: Corrections may be proposed before approval
stage_adopt_agenda_desc: Review and adopt the proposed agenda
stage_pending_second_subtitle: A second is required before debate may begin
stage_motion_pending_second_desc: Motion requires a second to proceed
stage_discussion_desc_default: Members debate the motion on the floor
stage_recess_subtitle: Business resumes when the chair reconvenes
stage_suspended_rules_subtitle: Normal parliamentary procedure is temporarily set aside
stage_adjourned_subtitle: Minutes may be exported for the record
topbar_order_none: No order of business was set in General Settings
about_subtitle: Based on Robert's Rules of Order
about_p1: Hatsell is a real-time parliamentary meeting assistant that guides groups through formal meetings using Robert's Rules of Order, Newly Revised (RONR). It manages the full lifecycle of a meeting: calling to order, roll call, motions, debate, voting, and adjournment.
about_p2: Named after John Hatsell, the 18th-century Clerk of the House of Commons whose procedural writings influenced Thomas Jefferson and ultimately Robert's Rules itself.
about_qs1_body: Select "President/Chair" as your role and click "Start Meeting." A meeting code is generated automatically.
about_qs2_body: Give the meeting code to all participants so they can join.
about_qs3_body: Each member selects their role, enters the meeting code, and clicks "Join Meeting."
about_qs4_title: Call to order and roll call
about_qs4_body: The Chair calls the meeting to order, then the Secretary completes roll call.
about_qs5_body: Members make motions, debate, and vote. Hatsell enforces the proper order of precedence automatically.
about_qs6_body: When all business is complete, the Chair adjourns the meeting. You can export minutes as a .docx file.
about_book_desc: Are you convinced that parliamentary procedure helps your meetings run smoother, fairer and more efficiently? Imagine what it could do for your country. "Why Not Parliamentarism?" is the common-sense, evidence and theory-based case for parliamentarism everywhere.
about_disclaimer_text: Hatsell is a tool to help meetings using a parliamentary authority. It is not supposed to replace them. Any conflict between Hatsell and the chosen parliamentary authority should be decided in favor of the official text.
about_created_by: Created by Tiago Ribeiro dos Santos
drawer_queue_empty: No one in the speaking queue.
drawer_export_minutes_tooltip: Download formal minutes as an editable Word document
amendment_proposed_label: If adopted, the motion would read:
chair_script_second: It has been moved: "{{text}}". Is there a second?
disclaimer_text: Hatsell is a tool to help meetings using a parliamentary authority. It is not supposed to replace them. Any conflict between Hatsell and the chosen parliamentary authority should be decided in favor of the official text.
disclaimer_data_firebase: Meeting data is transmitted via Firebase for real-time sync
disclaimer_data_local: Organization profiles are stored locally in your browser (not sent to any server)
disclaimer_data_session: Session data is cleared when the browser tab closes
disclaimer_data_no_personal: No personal data is collected or shared with third parties
disclaimer_data_temp: Meeting data in Firebase is temporary
inactivity_text: This meeting has been inactive for 30 minutes. It will automatically adjourn if no action is taken.
amend_wait_speaker: A member has the floor — wait for them to yield before recognizing amendments.
amend_wait_vote: A vote is in progress — announce the result before recognizing amendments.
amend_must_recognize: You must recognize or decline pending amendments before proceeding.
pending_wait_speaker: A member has the floor — wait for them to yield before recognizing motions.
pending_awaiting_second: Awaiting a second on the current motion before recognizing others.
pending_resolve_priority: These motions were proposed while a speaker had the floor. Resolve highest-priority first.
adjourned_export_msg: Meeting adjourned. You can export the minutes below.
tooltip_next_speaker: Give the floor to the next person in queue
chair_impartial_note: The chair should remain impartial. Use these tools only when necessary, such as when the chair wishes to make a motion (after passing the gavel to the vice-chair).
interrupted_suspend: Please suspend your intervention. Your clock has been paused.
vote_threshold: Threshold: {{threshold}} | Abstentions do not count as votes cast
vote_threshold_required: {{threshold}} required. Results will be announced by the chair.
vote_all_voted_chair: All members have voted — chair may vote or announce
vote_period_complete: Voting period complete - non-voters counted as abstentions
roll_call_officers_note: Vice Chair and Secretary, if present, are not part of roll call.
roll_call_all_officers: All officers are present. No members to call.
roll_call_instructions: Call each member. You can complete roll call as soon as quorum is met.
roll_call_quorum_met_ready: Quorum met. Complete roll call now or continue confirming attendance.
roll_call_quorum_unset_hint: Set a quorum requirement in Members before completing roll call.
roll_call_auto_present_officer: As {{role}}, you are automatically present (presiding officer).
roll_call_secretary_conducting: The Secretary is conducting roll call.
roll_call_auto_present_secretary: As Secretary, you are automatically present (conducting roll call).
roll_call_waiting: Waiting for your name to be called...
roll_call_responded: You have responded to roll call.
minutes_read_request: {{name}} requested the minutes to be read
minutes_debate_note: Debate the correction, then the chair may put it to a vote.
minutes_before_assembly: The minutes from the previous meeting are before the assembly for approval.
quorum_set_tooltip: Set the minimum attendance required to conduct business
rule_tie_sustains: Tie Sustains Chair (one half plus one vote)
based_on_ronr: Based on Robert's Rules of Order
alert_active_chair: A meeting is already in progress with an active Chair. Please join as a participant or wait for it to end.
alert_no_meeting: No active meeting found. Please wait for the Chair to start the meeting.
alert_name_in_use: The name "{{name}}" is already in use by an active participant. Please choose a different name.
log_roll_call_complete_quorum: Roll call complete. {{present}} of {{total}} members present. Quorum requirement: {{required}}. {{status}}
log_roll_call_complete: Roll call complete. {{present}} of {{total}} members present. Quorum established.
log_no_quorum: Meeting cannot proceed without a quorum. Meeting adjourned.
log_minutes_approved_adopt_agenda: Minutes approved. Proceeding to adopt the agenda.
log_minutes_approved_agenda: Minutes approved. Proceeding to the first agenda item.
log_minutes_approved_new_business: Minutes approved. Proceeding to New Business.
log_minutes_skipped_adopt_agenda: Minutes approval is optional for this meeting. Proceeding to adopt the agenda.
log_minutes_skipped_agenda: Minutes approval is optional for this meeting. Proceeding to the first agenda item.
log_minutes_skipped_new_business: Minutes approval is optional for this meeting. Proceeding to New Business.
log_agenda_adopted: Agenda adopted. Proceeding to first agenda item.
log_agenda_complete: Concluded agenda item: "{{title}}". All agenda items complete. Proceeding to New Business.
log_agenda_next: Concluded agenda item: "{{title}}". Moving to next item.
log_chair_recognizes: The chair recognizes the motion: "{{name}}". Is there a second?
log_ruled_out_of_order: The chair rules the motion "{{text}}" out of order.
log_chair_confirmed_second: The chair confirmed a second for: {{name}}.{{debateNote}}
log_no_second: The motion "{{text}}" falls for lack of a second.
log_motion_out_of_order_priority: {{name}} is out of order: a higher or equal priority motion is already pending.
log_no_pending_motion: No pending motion found at that index.
log_chair_recognizes_pending: Chair recognizes {{motionName}} by {{proposer}}: "{{text}}". Is there a second?
log_calls_question: The chair calls the question on: {{name}}. All in favor?
log_vote_result: Vote result: {{aye}} ayes, {{nay}} nays ({{threshold}} required). Motion {{result}}.
log_minutes_correction_vote: Vote on minutes correction: {{aye}} ayes, {{nay}} nays. The correction {{result}}.
log_pending_auto_dismissed: Pending motions auto-dismissed (object no longer exists): {{names}}
log_amendment_adopted: Amendment adopted. Debate continues on the motion as amended.
log_previous_question_ordered: Previous question ordered. Debate is closed. Proceeding to immediate vote.
log_chair_calls_vote: The chair calls a vote ({{threshold}} required).
log_new_speaking_list: The chair opens a new temporary speaking list.
log_temp_speaking_list: The chair opens a temporary speaking list (previous list paused).
log_resume_speaking_list: The chair resumes the previous speaking list.
log_continues_debate: Chair continues debate on the pending question.
log_continues_agenda_item: Chair continues with the current agenda item.
log_recognizes_amendment: Chair recognizes amendment by {{name}}: "{{text}}". Is there a second?
log_declines_amendment: Chair declines to recognize amendment from {{name}}
log_correction_recognized: Chair recognized the proposed correction by {{name}}
log_correction_returned: Chair returned the proposed correction to {{name}} for rephrasing
log_objection_to_correction: Objection raised to minutes correction. The correction is now before the assembly.
log_chair_rules_point: Chair rules: {{ruling}}. Point of order by {{name}} {{result}}.
log_correction_vote: The chair puts the minutes correction to a vote.
log_chair_left_vice: Chair {{chair}} has left. Vice Chair {{vice}} assumes the chair.
log_chair_left_adjourned: Chair {{name}} has left. No members remain. Meeting automatically adjourned.
log_chair_left_random: Chair {{chair}} has left. {{newChair}} has been randomly selected as Chair.
log_calls_orders: {{name}} calls for the Orders of the Day
log_returns_to_orders: Chair returns to the Orders of the Day
log_suspend_to_continue: Chair moves to suspend the rules to continue with current business (requires 2/3 vote). Is there a second?
log_returns_to_orders_unable: Chair returns to the Orders of the Day (unable to initiate suspend the rules)
confirm_clear_meeting: Are you sure you want to clear all meeting data? This will end the meeting for all participants.
log_adjourn_adopted: Motion to adjourn adopted. Meeting adjourned.
log_cannot_reconsider: {{name}} cannot move to reconsider: only members who voted on the prevailing side ({{side}}) may do so.
log_temp_list_completed: Temporary speaking list completed. Resuming previous list.
log_motion_queued_member: {{name}} moves: {{motionName}} - "{{text}}" (queued — a member has the floor)
